STG_CSF_PA_BUDGET_LINES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_BUDGET_LINES STG_CSF_PA_BUDGET_LINES,
 (
 select BUDGET_LINE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_BUDGET_LINES
 minus
 select BUDGET_LINE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_BUDGET_LINES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.BUDGET_LINE_ID = STG_CSF_PA_BUDGET_LINES.BUDGET_LINE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_BUDGET_LINES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_BUDGET_LINES)
